configuration_objects: complete coframe with a distinguished positive reciprocal pair and transverse completion
metric_relation: conditional physical block constructed from the pair
off_shell_status: phi not independent; its variation is induced by coframe variation
inequivalence_marker: field census contains no extra phi variable
limit: distinguished pair/readout/full completion remain unselected; not a complete universe

configuration_objects: signed point field phi plus transverse/coframe variables
phi_role: coordinate on the determinant-one reciprocal block
metric_relation: metric reciprocal block is parametrized by exp(-phi),exp(phi)
off_shell_status: phi is an independent coordinate on a restricted metric configuration space
inequivalence_marker: variation is reciprocal-tangent rather than unrestricted metric variation
limit: no native action/equation; may be a reparametrization of CM1 in a chosen chart

configuration_objects: complete metric and signed local phi field
metric_relation: no universal off-shell relation; conditional block can be an on-shell/readout restriction
CSN_behavior: assign phi weight zero; metric common scale is neutral
static_seal: impose odd static parity on phi only
inequivalence_marker: field census includes metric plus phi and permits normal metric variations
limit: no coupling/action/solution supplied; not a complete countermodel universe

configuration_objects: reciprocal coframe character D(phi) with off-diagonal Lorentzian K readout
metric_relation: D(phi)^T K D(phi)=K so isolated physical block is phi-invisible
off_shell_status: phi may be nondynamical comparison data
CSN_behavior: K block is unchanged by reciprocal character; common scale separate
static_seal: odd phi can be imposed independently
inequivalence_marker: metric does not reconstruct phi even though coframe carries it
limit: K as physical readout is CHOSE and unselected; conditional control only

configuration_objects: reciprocal coframe character plus one member of the exact mixed Lorentzian H0 family
phi_role: coframe comparison depth visible in the metric
metric_relation: g(phi)=D(phi)^T H0 D(phi) with a continuous unselected readout parameter
off_shell_status: ownership can be dependent or parametrizing depending on configuration choice
CSN_behavior: common scale separate; readout parameter survives
inequivalence_marker: metric visibility does not remove continuous readout ambiguity
limit: mixed soldering and anchor basis are not owner-locked; not a selected physical branch
